title: ストップ？ウララの大作戦

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I head towards the train station on my day off, I suddenly hear a
familiar voice.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: All right, time to put my super-duper secret plan into action!
choice_data_list: Oh? And what would that be?
Oh? And what would that be?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Well, you see... Wait! What are you doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yeah? Me too! Ah, but this is all a part of my super-duper secret
plan, so that's all I'm telling you!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Aaanyway, I better get going! See you later!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara dashes away before I can say another word. A mix of
curiosity and concern compels me to follow her.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hm... That magazine said it should be around here...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she wanders around aimlessly, one of the nearby shopkeepers
approaches her.

text_block_list.name: Shady Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Lookin' for somethin' special, are we?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yup! I'm trying to find the shoe store around here! Do you know
where it is?

text_block_list.name: Shady Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Forget about that store! I've got just the shoes for you, riiight here.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
No, thank you! I'm not looking for just any shoes. I need the kind that
give you super speed!

text_block_list.name: Shady Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
Well, what a co-inky-dink! These just so happen to be the
world-renowned Super Speed Sneakers! How about I give you a deal
on them?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... I have juuust enough to buy them, but... Are you SURE they'll
make me faster?

text_block_list.name: Shady Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
Positive! First place is as good as yours with these babies on your
feet!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Really truly?! Well... they are a bit expensive, but if they'll make me
faster—

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
What?! All that stuff about making me faster was a lie?! But he said
first place was as good as mine!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
No kidding... And now my super-duper secret plan to get faster is
down the drain!
choice_data_list: How were you going to do that?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: With shoes that make me extra fast, of course!
choice_data_list: Only practice can increase your speed.
Only practice can increase your speed.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I-I'm not trying to skip out on any training... I just want to get faster!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Remember those nice things the reporter said about you? That made
me really happy.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
If that's the kind of stuff she says NOW, imagine what people would
say about you if I WON!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I figured if I could find a way to win first place faster, I could surprise
you and everyone else!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'd love to win a race, and if that means everyone will praise you, I'd
love it even more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's already putting in the work, but Haru Urara still wants more. As
a trainer, I'm in awe of her dedication.
choice_data_list: Well, it's good to be motivated!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Right?! Ehehe, I'm glad you feel that way. I'll make sure to find the
right shoes—
choice_data_list: But we need to do this together.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Together?
choice_data_list: Let's find a way to win... together.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Yeah, you're right! I shoulda gone to you right away!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Well, looks like I'll need to give tomorrow's training some
extra-special effort! See you then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara excitedly runs back to Tracen Academy. With a better
understanding of her motivations, I feel my desire to help her win
growing even stronger.
